original_image_tags: A single sheet of lined paper with faint handwritten text in blue ink, much of it illegible. Two hole-punch marks are at the top. A vertical red margin line is on the left. The page shows signs of age and slight discoloration.

elements.description: A lined sheet of paper with faint handwritten text and two ink blots near the top. A red stamp at the bottom left reads 'FEB 18 72'. A blue stamp at the bottom right reads 'REC'D CORR & TOURS' and 'FEB 10 10 50 AM 1972'.

judge.reason: Description B invents specific stamps ('FEB 18 72', 'REC'D CORR & TOURS') and ink blots that Description A does not mention, creating a direct contradiction on the presence and text of visual elements.
